conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Share your thoughts on the quality of your gym’s facilities.
org_constraint: Use the phrase "state-of-the-art equipment and amenities" exactly three times.
instruction: Share your thoughts on the quality of your gym’s facilities. Use the phrase "state-of-the-art equipment and amenities" exactly three times. Avoid using the keyword "state-of-the-art".
response: The gym offers top-tier state-of-the-art equipment and amenities that make every workout feel like a premium experience. From the moment you walk in, the state-of-the-art equipment and amenities are designed to support your fitness goals with precision and comfort. It is rare to find a facility where the state-of-the-art equipment and amenities are maintained so meticulously, ensuring a safe and inspiring environment for all members.
